name: @chexian/cli
description: chexian-api 只读 CLI（PAT 鉴权，cx query/login/whoami）

scripts.build:bin:all: bun build src/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/cx-darwin-arm64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/cx-darwin-x64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/cx-linux-x64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile dist/cx-linux-arm64
